title: Diagnose OpenCode snippet expansion failure
summary: Investigate why existing OpenCode snippets such as #planrev no longer expand, identify the most likely cause, and define a fix plus end-to-end validation sequence.
keyOutcomes: Most likely root cause shifted toward stale or divergent OpenCode host runtime/session state
Standalone Bun smoke test proves the installed plugin can expand #planrev outside OpenCode
Implementation-ready diagnosis and validation plan created
risks: Root cause may live in OpenCode host runtime/session state rather than the plugin package alone
Static checks can pass while end-to-end hashtag expansion still fails
validationCriteria: #planrev expands in a fresh OpenCode session
Snippet logs contain no new interop warnings for gray-matter or jsonc-parser
At least one shell-enabled snippet expands successfully after restart
Standalone Bun smoke test continues to pass
